title: hydrocotyle novae-zeelandiae
intro: Hydrocotyle novae-zeelandiae, also known as New Zealand pennywort or native celery, is a perennial aquatic plant native to New Zealand and Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Hydrocotyle novae-zealandiae include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
